source: literature_derived_case_study: Zhang et al., Nature Communications 17, 197 (2026), doi:10.1038/s41467-025-66891-6

profiles.source: Zhang et al., Nature Communications 17, 197 (2026), doi:10.1038/s41467-025-66891-6
profiles.notes: Runnable literature-derived case-study profile for the organic OPECT paper selected from Perplexity-assisted search and checked against the locally copied article PDF. Conductance is normalized to avoid mixing incompatible absolute operating points; runtime uses G_min=1.0 and G_max=47.3 from the reported optimal G_max/G_min ratio. n_states=34 is explicitly anchored to Abstract / Results / Fig.3h / Supplementary Fig.8 rather than to the 120-pulse programming upper bound. sigma_c2c=0.02 is a transparent proxy estimate motivated by the 8-cycle repeatability evidence in Supplementary Fig.15 and Fig.3g; sigma_d2d=0.03 is a transparent proxy estimate motivated by the reported V_th spread across 80 devices (~0.67%-1.46%) and a conservative uplift to conductance-domain variability. retention parameters remain null because Fig.2d currently supports qualitative state-dependent retention discussion but not a locked in-paper fit. The raw literature NL metric (-0.015 / 2.01) is not injected directly because it is not numerically identical to the simulator's surrogate NL parameterization.
